summary.shape_sentence: Morning trend-up into a late-morning high, hard midday liquidation, then afternoon repair and a firm upper-half close.

goat.note: Late-morning upside expansion into the 25,380-25,392 supply band produced the standout move of the day.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered around the late-morning peak and noon breakdown, signaling failed continuation and momentum rollover.

green_circles.behavior: Appeared after the midday flush and again late, marking dip-buy support and afternoon repair.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply layers around 25,280, 25,330, and especially 25,370-25,390 were tested; lower zones broke early, but the top band held as the day cap.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25,240-25,250 and 25,200-25,220 was tested hard during the noon flush; the lower shelf held and launched the repair.

time_markers.10am_blue: Morning trend continuation, pressing through nearby resistance and holding bullish structure.
time_markers.12pm_red: Transition marker from late-morning strength into the sharp midday reversal and liquidation.
time_markers.2pm_green: Rebound/reclaim phase, with price off the lows and attempting to rebuild trend structure.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed after a late recovery push, in the upper half of the day's range but below the high.

takeaway: Bullish repair day with an early breakout, a violent noon flush, then afternoon rebuilding off defended lower demand.
